probes.name: chargeback-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms both migrations this module ships have run: chargebacks + chargeback_evidence, plus their composite unique indexes.

probes.name: chargeback-unique-indexes-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique indexes exist: (tenant_id, chargeback_number) on chargebacks; (tenant_id, chargeback_id, submission_attempt_number) on chargeback_evidence. Missing any index risks duplicate chargeback_number generation OR duplicate evidence submission attempts.

probes.name: chargeback-reason-catalog-loaded
probes.description: Confirms data/reason-code-catalog.json + data/reason-category-catalog.json + data/network-catalog.json are loaded + parsed. Missing catalogues fails chargeback creation.

probes.name: chargeback-evidence-deadlines-not-stale
probes.description: Warns when > 5 chargebacks sit in pending_evidence with evidence_due_by within the next 24 hours. Actionable — evidence deadline missed = auto-loss. Fires per-tenant.

probes.name: chargeback-expired-processing-clearing
probes.description: Warns when > 10 chargebacks in status='expired' exist with transaction_id IS NULL (finalization chain step 1 failed). Actionable via chargeback:reconcile admin CLI.

probes.name: chargeback-finalization-chain-clean
probes.description: Reads stackra.chargeback.finalization_failures_total counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal — FinalizeChargebackJob failed to complete the two-transaction + invoice state + clawback + marketing chain, leaving a lost/expired chargeback with orphan side effects.

probes.name: chargeback-terminal-orphans-clean
probes.description: Detects chargebacks in status IN ('lost', 'expired') with transaction_id IS NULL OR fee_transaction_id IS NULL — the finalization chain partially failed. Warn signal, actionable via chargeback:reconcile admin CLI.

probes.name: chargeback-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms CheckChargebackStatusJob completed within the last 25 hours (nightly cadence + 1h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: chargeback-rate-monitor-recent
probes.description: Confirms MonitorChargebackRateJob completed within the last 25 hours. Stale rate monitoring = merchant-account risk visibility lost.

probes.name: chargeback-rate-thresholds-not-breached
probes.description: Reads latest rate cache (cbk:rate:{tenant_id}:{network}) + flags tenants over threshold. P1 signal per tenant — sustained breach risks merchant-account termination.

probes.name: chargeback-provider-manager-healthy
probes.description: Delegates to payment::PaymentProviderManager health check. Chargeback can't dispatch evidence if payment providers are down. Warn when any provider circuit breaker is open.

probes.name: chargeback-clawback-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 10 ChargebackClawbackReferral / ChargebackClawbackCoupon events are stuck in the queue > 30 min. Indicates downstream referrals/coupon modules are failing to process cascades.
